data.name: Saint Ceri
data.detailed_description:
Saint Ceri is a visual novel with a focus on romance and intimacy. It offers both monogamous and poly routes with three love interests and is generally centered around soft femdom and the female gaze.




You are the chosen one of the deity of love, family and motherhood, dispensing blessings in her name.

But you’re hardly blessed yourself. Your love life ended with the death of your first husband, the church overworks you and you’re not sure why your deity chose you in the first place.
The spring festival approaches, and with it a worrying ultimatum: the church wants you happily married; whether you want it or not.
A few volunteers offer themselves: your devoted paladin Bryn, who asks not for love but only for the chance to serve you. The stern priest Kyros, who flusters and bristles at your every word. The local duchess Eira, whose relationship to your church is strange and complex but who treats you with unexpected warmth.





Can you find love with one -or more- of them? Will you marry for love or duty, or find a way to avoid marriage entirely?

The demo features:


  • 15 thousands words
  • 3 love interests
  • 6 CGs (2 NSFW)
  • The option to play in SFW mode, making the intimate scenes less explicit and replacing the NSFW CGs with SFW cut-ins

The full release will contain:

  • A dozen NSFW scenes
  • The option to pursue a relationship with a single character or a poly relationship with two or all LIs

The full release will contain:

  • A dozen NSFW scenes
  • The option to pursue a relationship with a single character or a poly relationship with two or all LIs
data.short_description: An adult otome with three love interests and monogamous and poly routes! Play as Saintess Ceridwen, an overworked saintess pressured to get engaged in two weeks' time. Can you find love with one -or more- of your suitors? Will you marry for love or duty, or find a way to avoid marriage entirely?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1.5 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS 10.9 (64 bit)
  • 處理器: 1.5 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
